utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan includes both physical and mental sub-items, each with plan name, benefits, and monthly_cost; this is fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes plan name, benefits, and monthly_cost; this is fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan includes plan name, benefits, and monthly_cost; this is fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan provides a description but no cost is specified, so it is not fully specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. It gives a monthly total (€265/month) but no annual breakdown; since it asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual component is missing, so not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health), HomeFirst Standard Coverage (property/home), and LifeFirst Standard Plan for Travel (travel). We must match each to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. The mappings are: Physical health plan 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' matches primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan with rating 9. Mental health plan 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' matches primary_health_coverage.mental_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan with rating 8. Property 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' matches property_protection.home_content.HomeFirst Standard Coverage with rating 8. Travel plan 'LifeFirst Standard Plan for Travel' corresponds to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan (same plan name without the 'for Travel' suffix) with rating 9.
